clusters.title: Trump says ‘many countries’ will send warships to Hormuz amid Iran blockade
clusters.neutral_headline: Trump Urges Countries To Send Warships

items.title: Trump says ‘many countries’ will send warships to Hormuz amid Iran blockade
items.standfirst: US president urges naval coalition as Iran says Strait of Hormuz closed to 'tankers and ships of enemies' during war.
items.content: US president urges naval coalition as Iran says Strait of Hormuz closed to 'tankers and ships of enemies' during war.

items.title: Trump urges other countries to deploy ships to help reopen strait of Hormuz
items.standfirst: President calls on China, France, Japan and the UK to send vessels after US strikes Kharg Island oil facilitiesMiddle East crisis – live updatesDonald Trump has called on other countries to send ships to help reopen the strait of Hormuz, the critical chokepoint for global oil supplies which Iran has closed to almost all shipping in retaliation for the joint US-Israeli offensive launched two weeks ago.In the latest flurry of social media posts, Trump wrote on Saturday on Truth Social that “many countries, especially those who are affected by Iran’s attempted closure of the Hormuz Strait, will be sending War Ships, in conjunction with the United States of America, to keep the Strait open and safe.” Continue reading...
items.content: President calls on China, France, Japan and the UK to send vessels after US strikes Kharg Island oil facilitiesMiddle East crisis – live updatesDonald Trump has called on other countries to send ships to help reopen the strait of Hormuz, the critical chokepoint for global oil supplies which Iran has closed to almost all shipping in retaliation for the joint US-Israeli offensive launched two weeks ago.In the latest flurry of social media posts, Trump wrote on Saturday on Truth Social that “many countries, especially those who are affected by Iran’s attempted closure of the Hormuz Strait, will be sending War Ships, in conjunction with the United States of America, to keep the Strait open and safe.” Continue reading...

items.title: Trump calls on UK to send warships to keep strait of Hormuz open
items.standfirst: US president urges nations to deploy vessels to keep key oil shipping route open amid conflict with IranDonald Trump has said the UK should send warships to help keep the strait of Hormuz open.In a post on his Truth Social platform, the US president urged the UK and other countries to deploy vessels to the strait amid the conflict with Iran. Continue reading...
items.content: US president urges nations to deploy vessels to keep key oil shipping route open amid conflict with IranDonald Trump has said the UK should send warships to help keep the strait of Hormuz open.In a post on his Truth Social platform, the US president urged the UK and other countries to deploy vessels to the strait amid the conflict with Iran. Continue reading...

items.title: Trump urges France, UK, China to help open Strait of Hormuz as Iran war enters third week
items.standfirst: Two weeks after the US and Israel attacked Iran, prompting Tehran to block the Strait of Hormuz, US President Donald Trump on Saturday urged France, Britain, China, Japan and South Korea to help secure the shipping lane through which 20% of global oil and gas travels. Iranian strikes hit the US embassy in Baghdad and a major Emirati energy facility, sending further shockwaves to the industry.
items.content: Two weeks after the US and Israel attacked Iran, prompting Tehran to block the Strait of Hormuz, US President Donald Trump on Saturday urged France, Britain, China, Japan and South Korea to help secure the shipping lane through which 20% of global oil and gas travels. Iranian strikes hit the US embassy in Baghdad and a major Emirati energy facility, sending further shockwaves to the industry.

ai_summary: Trump calls for naval coalition to reopen Strait of Hormuz
Iran closes Strait to tankers and enemy ships
US strikes Kharg Island oil facilities in Iran
Trump urges UK and other countries to deploy warships
Global oil supplies affected by Hormuz Strait closure

items.content: A combined missile and drone attack on the Kyiv region killed at least four people and wounded at least 15 overnight into Saturday.

items.title: Russian missile and drone attacks kills several in Kyiv region
items.standfirst: Four people were killed and at least 15 injured by a combined Russian missile and drone attack in the Kyiv region overnight into Saturday, a local official said. Russia continues to launch almost daily attacks on Ukraine as US-brokered peace talks between the two nations have stalled amid the war in the Middle East.
items.content: Four people were killed and at least 15 injured by a combined Russian missile and drone attack in the Kyiv region overnight into Saturday, a local official said. clusters.title: Judge blocks Trump administration's subpoenas against Fed Chair Powell

items.title: Judge blocks Trump administration's subpoenas against Fed Chair Powell
items.standfirst: A federal judge blocked two grand jury subpoenas against Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell on Friday. Chief Judge James Boasberg wrote that "the Government has offered no evidence whatsoever that Powell committed any crime other than displeasing the President."
items.content: A federal judge blocked two grand jury subpoenas against Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell on Friday. Chief Judge James Boasberg wrote that "the Government has offered no evidence whatsoever that Powell committed any crime other than displeasing the President."

items.title: Judge blocks justice department from subpoenaing Fed chair Jerome Powell
items.standfirst: Trump DoJ’s investigation was purportedly about the management of the central bank’s renovationA federal judge on Friday blocked the justice department from serving subpoenas to Federal Reserve chair Jerome Powell in an inquiry purported to be about the management of the central bank’s renovation.Powell disclosed the surprise investigation on 11 January, and described the move as a threat to Fed independence and part of the Trump administration’s attempts to pressure the Fed to cut rates. Continue reading...
items.content: Trump DoJ’s investigation was purportedly about the management of the central bank’s renovationA federal judge on Friday blocked the justice department from serving subpoenas to Federal Reserve chair Jerome Powell in an inquiry purported to be about the management of the central bank’s renovation.Powell disclosed the surprise investigation on 11 January, and described the move as a threat to Fed independence and part of the Trump administration’s attempts to pressure the Fed to cut rates. clusters.title: German philosopher and social critic Jürgen Habermas dies at 96

items.title: German philosopher and social critic Jürgen Habermas dies at 96
items.standfirst: One the most influential thinkers in post-war Germany, he linked philosophy and political action throughout his life.
items.content: One the most influential thinkers in post-war Germany, he linked philosophy and political action throughout his life.

items.title: Jürgen Habermas, German philosopher and sociologist, dies aged 96
items.standfirst: Habermas’s political consensus-building theory argued formation of public opinion vital for democracies to surviveThe influential German philosopher and sociologist Jürgen Habermas has died at the age of 96, his publisher has said.Habermas, a towering figure in the intellectual history of postwar Germany, is best known for his theory of political consensus-building. Widely considered one of most influential philosophers of the 20th century, he also helped to shape the discourse around European integration and the formation of the EU. Continue reading...
items.content: Habermas’s political consensus-building theory argued formation of public opinion vital for democracies to surviveThe influential German philosopher and sociologist Jürgen Habermas has died at the age of 96, his publisher has said.Habermas, a towering figure in the intellectual history of postwar Germany, is best known for his theory of political consensus-building. Widely considered one of most influential philosophers of the 20th century, he also helped to shape the discourse around European integration and the formation of the EU. Continue reading...

ai_summary: Jürgen Habermas dies at the age of 96
Habermas linked philosophy and political action

Widely considered one of the most influential philosophers

clusters.title: Cuban president confirms talks with Trump officials amid US blockade
clusters.neutral_headline: Cuban President Confirms Talks With Trump Officials

items.title: Cuban president confirms talks with Trump officials amid US blockade
items.standfirst: Negotiations aimed to ‘find solutions to the bilateral differences’ between the countries, Miguel Díaz-Canel saidCuban officials have held talks with the US government, the country’s president, Miguel Díaz-Canel, confirmed on Friday, amid growing pain inflicted by a punishing US fuel blockade and frequent power failures.“These talks have been aimed at finding solutions through dialogue to the bilateral differences we have between the two nations,” Díaz-Canel said in a prerecorded statement to senior Communist officials. Continue reading...

Continue reading...

items.content: Cuba's president said the conversations are focused on "finding solutions to bilateral differences" as the country grapples with a lack of fuel following the U.S. raid in Venezuela.

clusters.title: King Charles concerned about Alberta separatist movement, First Nation chief says
clusters.neutral_headline: King Charles Concerned About Alberta Separatist Movement

items.title: King Charles concerned about Alberta separatist movement, First Nation chief says
items.standfirst: Joey Pete of Sunchild First Nation said king seemed ‘committed to learning’ after meeting Indigenous leadersKing Charles has expressed concern over a simmering separatist movement in western Canada, according to Indigenous leaders who met the head of state at Buckingham Palace.Members of the Confederacy of Treaty Six First Nations travelled to London from their territories in the province of Alberta to raise the alarm over the secessionist movement, arguing that it ignores key agreements signed between First Nations and the crown nearly 150 years ago. Continue reading...
items.content: Joey Pete of Sunchild First Nation said king seemed ‘committed to learning’ after meeting Indigenous leadersKing Charles has expressed concern over a simmering separatist movement in western Canada, according to Indigenous leaders who met the head of state at Buckingham Palace.Members of the Confederacy of Treaty Six First Nations travelled to London from their territories in the province of Alberta to raise the alarm over the secessionist movement, arguing that it ignores key agreements signed between First Nations and the crown nearly 150 years ago. Continue reading...

items.title: King expressed 'concern' over Alberta separatists, say First Nations chiefs
items.standfirst: Indigenous leaders made Charles aware of the "threat" posed by the movement during a meeting in London, they say.
items.content: Indigenous leaders made Charles aware of the "threat" posed by the movement during a meeting in London, they say.

ai_summary: King Charles expresses concern over Alberta separatism
Indigenous leaders meet with King Charles
Separatist movement ignores key agreements
King Charles committed to learning about the issue
Meeting takes place at Buckingham Palace
